Built for construction teams

One project.
Three stakeholders.
One trusted truth.

Pulse AI connects Owners, Consultants, and Contractors around a single source of project truth — documents, decisions, tasks, risks, and AI insights in one operational layer.
Request Demo →
See Platform
◆ SOC 2◆ ISO 27001◆ Built for Gulf megaprojects
The Problem

Every stakeholder works from a different version of the truth.

Drawings in one drive. Decisions in an inbox. Tasks in a spreadsheet. Risks in a slide deck. Multiplied across 3 companies — chaos is inevitable.
1
Fragmented Reality
Each company maintains its own files, statuses, and numbers.
2
Invisible Risk
Critical decisions get buried in emails and meeting notes.
3
Costly Rework
By the time misalignment surfaces, budget and schedule are gone.

The Solution

One project. Three stakeholders. One reliable operational truth.

Pulse AI unifies evidence, decisions, and timelines. Every stakeholder sees the same reality — filtered for their role.
Pulse AI
One source of truth

cards tilt 3D on hover · cursor-tracked sheen
◆ The Economics

Construction delays cost real money.
Pulse AI saves it.

Average delay cost on a large UAE construction project is AED 150,000 per day. A typical 70-day delay translates to AED 10M+ in lost value. Pulse AI cuts that by 30%.
AED 150K
Average delay cost
per day on large projects
70 days
Typical project delay
without operational truth
30%
Reduction with Pulse AI
through faster decisions
AED 3.15M
Saved per project
over the project lifecycle
economics moment · accent numerals on light

Teams ship projects on Pulse.

Marina Tower
Marina Tower closed 42% fewer RFIs and delivered 18 days ahead of schedule with Pulse.

Arcadia centralised 11,000 drawings and shortened review cycles by 3.1x using Pulse.

How it works

Fragmented information, reconciled into one reality.

01
Connect
Link drives, trackers, inboxes, and models. No migration required.
02
Reconcile
Pulse maps every document, decision, and task to the project graph.
03
Intelligence
AI flags risk, escalates blockers, and surfaces what matters now.
04
Align
Every stakeholder sees their view of a single shared truth.

See your project in one place.

The Capabilities

Six surfaces. One reconciled reality.

01
02 / 06
Document Graph
Contracts, drawings, specs — connected by context, not folder paths. Every file knows its dependencies.
02
02 / 06
Decision Ledger
Every decision captured with owner, rationale, and downstream impact. Auditable forever.
03
02 / 06
AI Risk Radar
Pulse reads your plan and flags risk before impact. Every risk has an owner and a mitigation.
04
02 / 06
Schedule Intelligence
Root-cause analysis for every schedule slip. Reconciled from field reports automatically.
05
02 / 06
Unified Comms
RFIs, submittals, approvals — one threaded surface with SLAs and escalations baked in.
06
02 / 06
Compliance Trail
Audit-grade evidence for every regulator and lender. Export in one click.
Integrations

Connect to existing systems. Orchestrate data across ERPs, schedulers, accounting, and BIM — and pipe it into Pulse with APIs, partner apps, or prebuilt integrations.

Pulse hub
Pulse-managed connector
Your existing system

The operating layer for
modern construction.

The Platform

Every layer of the project, reconciled.

Pulse is built as six deeply connected surfaces. Each one becomes more valuable because of the others.

each card reacts to cursor · content layers tilt + parallax on hover
01
Feature
Document Graph
Drawings, specs, contracts, submittals — connected by project context, not folder paths. Every document knows its dependencies.
02
Feature
Decision Ledger
Every decision captured with owner, rationale, and downstream impact. Regulator-grade audit trail.
DEC · 11 approved·····
DEC · 09 deferred·····
DEC · 07 approved·····
DEC · 04 rejected·····
DEC · 02 approved·····
03
Feature
Schedule Intelligence
Pulse reconciles master schedule with daily field reports. Root-cause analysis for every slip.
04
Feature
Risk Radar
AI reads drawings, comms, and schedule to flag risk before impact. Every risk has an owner.
05
Feature
RFI & Submittals
Purpose-built for consultant workflows. Route, review, return — with SLAs and escalations baked in.
RFI-0142 · Slab rebar clash
RFI-0141 · MEP coordination
RFI-0140 · Curtain wall anchor
RFI-0139 · Stair tread detail
DUE 2d
06
Feature
Ask Pulse
Natural-language interface to the project. Answers cite the source every time.
Why did the concrete pour slip?
Weather delay on Nov 4. Source: Daily Report #237, Field Memo 0212. →
· cites 2 sources ·

Onboarding flow
5 steps · first-run · no template
1 · Role
Pulse AI
Step 1 of 5
Skip setup
Welcome. Let's connect your project.
first-run · no template
Pulse works best when it can see the project. Pick your role — we'll tailor the next steps.
Selected
Owner
I need executive visibility across the portfolio.
Consultant
I coordinate designs, RFIs, and submittals.
Contractor
I execute on site and need clear priorities.
← Back
Continue →
2 · Project & invites
Pulse AI
Step 2 of 5
Skip setup
Name your project & invite counterparts.
Project name
Marina Tower Phase 2|
Contract value
847,000,000 AED
Duration
28 months
Invite counterparts
Consultant (Lead)
Arup · r.iyer@arup.com
Main Contractor
Mace · m.khan@mace.com
+
+ Add stakeholder
Why invite now?
Pulse only delivers a single source of truth when every party sees the same project. Your counterparts get their own portal — they don't have to use your view.
each party owns their lens, shares one truth

Continue →

◆ The Economics

Construction delays cost real money.
Pulse AI saves it.

Average delay cost on a large UAE construction project is AED 150,000 per day. A typical 70-day delay translates to AED 10M+ in lost value. Pulse AI cuts that by 30%.

The Capabilities

Six surfaces. One reconciled reality.

01
02 / 06
Document Graph
Contracts, drawings, specs — connected by context, not folder paths. Every file knows its dependencies.
02
02 / 06
Decision Ledger
Every decision captured with owner, rationale, and downstream impact. Auditable forever.
03
02 / 06
AI Risk Radar
Pulse reads your plan and flags risk before impact. Every risk has an owner and a mitigation.
04
02 / 06
Schedule Intelligence
Root-cause analysis for every schedule slip. Reconciled from field reports automatically.
05
02 / 06
Unified Comms
RFIs, submittals, approvals — one threaded surface with SLAs and escalations baked in.
06
02 / 06
Compliance Trail
Audit-grade evidence for every regulator and lender. Export in one click.
Integrations

Connect to existing systems. Orchestrate data across ERPs, schedulers, accounting, and BIM — and pipe it into Pulse with APIs, partner apps, or prebuilt integrations.
